title: KVarN: Variance-Normalized KV-Cache Quantization Mitigates Error Accumulation in Reasoning Tasks
one_sentence_judgment: 把 KV-Cache 量化的评测设定从 prefill(静态)纠正到 test-time scaling 真实的逐步累积场景,指出量化误差跨时间步累积、罪魁是 token 幅度被压坏,并用 Hadamard 旋转+双轴方差归一化组合在 2.3 bit/元素下做到生成式 benchmark 新 SOTA(MATH500 在 Phi-4-14B 上 84.9→84.8 近无损,KIVI 仅 74.4),在线开销仅 0.18%;洞察扎实(误差几何拆分+离群点不成比例重要+便宜的 pseudo-decode 协议),但方法是 Hadamard(QuaRot)+方差归一化(SINQ)的组合而非全新算子,且缺生产框架端到端延迟实证(2-bit KV-Cache 暂无公开服务框架支持),不适用 SSM、对 MLA 影响未知。

auditors: claude-opus (orchestrator, independent of the opus author)
cold_audit.verdict: Cross-model PASS by both. Authored by an opus sub-agent; audited independently by Claude (Kevin-distinct model from author family) AND codex GPT-5.5. Round 1: codex HELD for missing 自报/实测 tagging. Revised: added an 自报-vs-实测 disclaimer marking all benchmark numbers/ablations/0.18% overhead as 论文自报 and star/upvote as snapshots. Round 2: codex PASS + Claude PASS. Authorized by Kevin (deploy contingent on you+codex independent cross-model pass).
